The code is benign.\n- **Justification:** Since no malicious or risky behavior is present, the security risk should be 0.\n- **Verdict:** The malware score is correctly 0; the obfuscated score is 0; but the securityRisk should be 0, not 0.1.\n\n#### **Report 5**\n- **Purpose:** Module generated by TypeScript with source map.\n- **Analysis:** Correct; typical build artifact.\n- **Scores:** All zeros, confidence=1.\n- **Verdict:** Appropriate.\n\n---\n\n### Summary and recommendations:\n\n- **Code presence:** The code snippets do not contain any malicious, obfuscated, or risky behavior.
